Print a BayesianGPU Distribution

Model Building

Model
Bayesian Model Builder
param()
Add a parameter to a model (pipe-friendly)
observe()
Set observed data on a model (pipe-friendly)

Sampling

bg_sample()
Run NUTS Sampling
quick_sample()
Quick Sampling

Results

InferenceResult
Inference Result
as.data.frame(<InferenceResult>)
Convert InferenceResult to data.frame
summary(<InferenceResult>)
Summary of InferenceResult
